test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient for a verification-only subtask: verifier reran src/gui and src/strategic builds and rechecked FGame dialog-decoupling and residual wx-boundary evidence directly against source.
documentation_accuracy_summary: verification_notes.md and verifier_prompt.txt are accurate; documenter_report.md and documenter_result.json contain a stale documenter commit hash.

findings.summary: Documenter artifacts report a stale commit hash.
